titleStmt.title: SII 26.769: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 769. (A.R. No. 718 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tiruvaḷar puyat-tirunilavalaiya, etc.

It records that the Peruṅguṟi Perumakkaḷ of Śrī-Madurāntakach-charuppēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Rājēndrasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu assembled in the temple of Tiruviśalūr Paḷḷikoṇḍāḻvār of their village decided to make a gift of land as Tiruchchennaḍaippuṟam to the temple of Tiruvālīśvaram-uḍaiya-mahādēvar of the village with permission to have this record engraved on the temple of Śrī-Kayilāsamuḍaiyār of the place. The gift-land is stated to have been situated in the place and it is stated that all the incomes levied from the gift-land would be paid by the mahāsabhai itself.

Among the signatories were a bhaṭṭa of Kaṇḍēṟṟu in Śrī-Madurāntaka-chēri, a kramavitta of Tiruneṟkuḷam in Śrī-Tribuvaṉamādēvi •••, another of Neraṭṭūr in Śrī-Kaḍāraṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-chēri, another of Śiṟukoṭṭaiyūr in Śrī-Kaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-chēri, the Kaḍigai (Ghaṭikā) madhyasthan of Madurāntakach-charuppēdimaṅgalam itself, some persons of Dattamaṅgalam, another of Vaṅgipuṟam another of Kārikuḍi, another of Ōrāyūr, another of Vallūr, another from Muṭpuṟam and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvaḷarpuyat tirunilavalaiyamuntaṉ maṇippūṇeṉattāṅkip paṉmaṇik koṟṟa veṇkuṭainiḻal kuvalaiyattuyirkaḷaip peṟṟatāyilum peṇimaṟṟuḷ Aṟaikaḻalaraicar taṉṉaṭi niḻalotuṅka muṟai pilattuṭaikali Otuṅka muṟaimaiyi peṟṟa tamaiyaṉ Āḷavantāṉai Irumpuvipukaḻa rājādhirāja- nenṟu Oḷimaṇi muṭicūṭṭi taṉṟuṇaitampi
tāka viḻavampa viḻalaṅkalamati puraikaviṉta maturāntakaṉai vāḷentu tāṉaiccoḷentiraneṉṟu Eṇṭicai pukaḻeḻil muṭicūṭṭit toṇṭaimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷit tiṇṭiṟalivāralarum putalvaruḷ rājentricoḻaṉai Eḻuyirāṉai coḻapāṇṭiyaneṉṟu Īṇṭoḷi maṇimuṭi Icaipeṟa cūṭṭi pāṇ(ṇa)ṭimaṇṭalaṅ kuṭuttaruḷi Āṇṭakai Orumuṭi coḻaṉai perumaiyi Ellāntaṉnoṭu Okka vaittaruḷi ṉanaruc
n=taracoḻaṉu coḻakoṉṉumeṉṟantamil peruṅkuṇattaraiciyaṟkkuriya maintarai maṇimuṭicūṭṭi taṉa kiḷai Evvavarulakattavavarkkuriyaṟukaliṭa veṟuveṟaruḷi pukāḻupākkaḷu kaita kuṭakkāṟaruḷakkiyai muṭakkāṟṟuṭaipuṟaṅkaṇṭu paṭaittoḻivirutoṭumalaikka kkalaṟaḷanovaricilaitakkai mācāmantarai kaṅkapāṭikaḷattiṭai niṉṟu tuṅkapattirai pukaturatti Āṅkavar veṅkai naṉnāṭṭiṭai miṭṭuvar viṭṭatāṅkaru peruvalitaṇṭu keṭattā
kki mātaṇṭanāyakaṉ cāmuṇṭarājaṉaic ceṟṟuvaṉ cirattiṉai Aṟuttu maṟṟavaṉ Oru makaḷākiya Irukaiyaṉtevi naākalaiyenṉu tokai perucāyalai mukattoṭu mukku veṟākki makaccuṭarātaṉ maṇa paṅkuta katapāt tokutiyuvar moḻipaṭa komukatukoṭṭi kaṭṭuyar pulaṅ jaiya veṇ pukaḻoṭu ceṅkoṉeṭu ticaitoṟuc cella Acaivaṉṟavar taṉakkoṭi taṉ koṭi catirkkoṭiyeṭuttu
Eṟṟavar varukeṉṟuniṟpa portoḻi Urimaiyileḷiyeti Aracaviṟṟiruttu mevarum maṉuneṟi viḷaṅkiya kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīvirarājentradeva- ṟkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu nāḷ toṇṇūṟṟeḻiṉāl rājentraciṅkavaḷa nāṭṭu brahmadeyam
śrīmaturāntakaccaruppetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Iṟṟaināḷ pakal nammur tiruvicalūr paḷḷikoṇṭāḻvār tirumuṟṟatte peruṅkuṟi kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇitta veḻuttu nammur tiruvāliśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku tiruccennaṭaippuṟamāka nammur śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyār koyilile kalveṭṭikoḷḷa tiruccennaṭaippuṟamāka kuṭutta nilamāva
tu śrīkovarttaṉa kumiḻiniṉṟu teṟku nokkipona śrīkovarttaṉa vāykkālukku teṟku meṟkum decakāmattupperiyanampikkiramavittaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum pāṭakattu kumāraṭikiramavitta nilattukku kiḻakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam 2mā 1kāṇilil Innilam I yāvatākavum Innilattāl vanta peruvari cilavariyum veḷḷānveṭṭiyum Antarāyamum
Uḷḷiṭṭu Eppeṟpaṭṭitu sabhaiyome Iṟukkakkaṭavomākavum Ipparicu Iṉ nilam cantirātittaval Iṟaiyiliye ceytu kuṭuttom mahāsabhaiyom Ipparicu kuṟiyiliruntu śrīmaturāntakacerikaṇṭeṟṟu 2māl tevapaṭṭaṉum śrītripuvaṉamātevico tu tiruneṟkuḷaṟkkiramavittaṉum śrīkaṭāraṅ koṇṭacoḻaceri neraṭṭur Iḷavaṭi kiramavittaṉum
neraṭṭur colaipirāṉ paṭṭaṉum śrīkaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaceri ciṟukoṭṭai yūr tattan traiyilokiyalojaṉaṉum paṇiyāl Ivvūr kaṭikai maddhastan mallaṭikaḷ poṟṟāḻiyān cātupiriyanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven neraṭṭur Iḷavaṭi kiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven tattamaṅkalattu nārāyaṇanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven vaṅkipuṟattu paṟpanākiramavittanen
Ippaṭi Aṟiven neraṭṭur colaipirān paṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkipuṟattu tiruneṟkunṟakiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven kārikuṭi cuvarna tāmotiranen Ippaṭi Aṟiven nammūr tiruvaraṅkatevakiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven pāṭakattu kumāraṭikiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Orāyūr tā paṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven kaṇṭeṟṟu paḷḷikoṇṭānen paṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven vaṅkipuṟattu śrīkraṣṇakiramavi
ttan makan comacanmakiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven veṭkovanpaṭṭan Āṭavalānen Ippaṭi Aṟiven vallūr nārāyaṇakiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven koṟukoṭṭamātaṅkiramavittanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven muṭpuṟattu Urutta pūtipaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven ciṟukoṭṭaiyūr tattan trai- lokiyalocananen Itu panmahāyeśvararakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.769 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
